tools.name: list_capabilities_v1
tools.description: List available exascale.build data capabilities for agent discovery before querying. Also call this BEFORE stating that a capability is not available — client tool lists are cached and this surface grows; anything listed here is reachable via query_capability_v1 even if your tool list predates it.

tools.name: get_source_evidence_v1
tools.description:
Fetch and hash-verify the raw source row behind a returned citation.

Pass a citation object inside `params`. Two ready-to-pass shapes come straight from
the query tools: each aggregate row's `citations[ref].verify` object, or a detail
record's `citation` (from include_records). Either proves the nu

tools.name: describe_capability_v1
tools.description:
Describe any served capability by name — the generic twin of the named describe tools.

Pass `capability` as either a capability id from list_capabilities_v1 (e.g. "power.capacity")
or a query primitive name (e.g. "query_power_capacity_v1"). Returns the same schema payload
as the named describe tool

tools.name: query_capability_v1
tools.description:
Query any served capability by name — the generic twin of the named query tools, reaching every capability including ones newer than your client's cached tool list.

Pass `capability` as either a capability id from list_capabilities_v1 (e.g. "power.price_ercot")
or a query primitive name (e.g. "quer

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: query_power_interconnection_queue_pjm_v1, query_power_interconnection_queue_pjm_cycle_v1 · Private data: get_source_evidence_v1, query_power_capacity_v1, query_power_demand_v1, query_power_demand_rollup_v1, query_power_retail_sales_v1, query_power_interconnection_queue_v1, query_power_interconnection_queue_pjm_v1, query_power_interconnection_queue_pjm_cycle_v1, query_power_interconnection_queue_caiso_v1, query_power_interconnection_queue_nyiso_v1, query_power_interconnection_queue_isone_v1, query_power_interconnection_queue_ercot_v1, query_power_interconnection_queue_spp_v1, query_power_price_ercot_v1, query_ai_infrastructure_construction_v1, query_ai_infrastructure_employment_v1, query_ai_infrastructure_trade_v1, query_ai_infrastructure_equipment_trade_v1, query_ai_infrastructure_production_v1, query_robotics_trade_v1, query_robotics_adoption_v1, query_space_satellite_filings_v1 · Public sink: query_power_demand_rollup_v1, query_power_interconnection_queue_pjm_cycle_v1, query_power_interconnection_queue_spp_v1, query_power_price_ercot_v1, query_ai_infrastructure_construction_v1, query_robotics_adoption_v1, query_capacity_factor_v1.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: query_power_interconnection_queue_pjm_v1, query_power_interconnection_queue_pjm_cycle_v1 · Private data: get_source_evidence_v1, query_power_capacity_v1, query_power_demand_v1, query_power_demand_rollup_v1, query_power_retail_sales_v1, query_power_interconnection_queue_v1, query_power_interconnection_queue_pjm_v1, query_power_interconnection_queue_pjm_cycle_v1, query_power_interconnection_queue_caiso_v1, query_power_interconnection_queue_nyiso_v1, query_power_interconnection_queue_isone_v1, query_power_interconnection_queue_ercot_v1, query_power_interconnection_queue_spp_v1, query_power_price_ercot_v1, query_ai_infrastructure_construction_v1, query_ai_infrastructure_employment_v1, query_ai_infrastructure_trade_v1, query_ai_infrastructure_equipment_trade_v1, query_ai_infrastructure_production_v1, query_robotics_trade_v1, query_robotics_adoption_v1, query_space_satellite_filings_v1 · Public sink: query_power_demand_rollup_v1, query_power_interconnection_queue_pjm_cycle_v1, query_power_interconnection_queue_spp_v1, query_power_price_ercot_v1, query_ai_infrastructure_construction_v1, query_robotics_adoption_v1, query_capacity_factor_v1

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
